## Summary

Describe the change and the problem it solves.

## Technical notes

Explain relevant PostgreSQL versions, hooks, memory contexts, error paths or compatibility considerations.

## Verification

- [ ] `make` succeeds.
- [ ] `make installcheck` succeeds.
- [ ] The change was tested on every affected PostgreSQL major version.
- [ ] New behaviour has regression coverage.
- [ ] No proprietary code, customer data or secrets are included.
- [ ] Documentation and changelog were updated where relevant.
